name: Lukas - MLBB
description:
' ᴛʜᴇ ꜱᴀᴄʀᴇᴅ ʙᴇᴀꜱᴛ '

Once sealed for thousand years now has been released by the Princess of Moniyan Empire to fight alongside her against the Abyss.

Now the new era has come, but that doesn't mean Lukas know everything what had happened while he was sealed! As the Sacred Beast of a new era, Lukas went about busily catching up with everything he had missed.

Author's note :
